forager-smart.description: Only use this worker for tasks that require a high level of intelligence, reasoning, and creativity to solve complex problems that are not well defined or have many steps or decisions to make.

forager-capable.description: Only use this worker for tasks that require an agent that has extra capabilities to write better code and make use of complex tools calls to complete multiple actions.

forager-documents.description: Use this worker for document-heavy tasks. This includes things like writing documentation, creating reports, and other non-code documents.

forager-simple.description: Only use this worker for tasks that require a low level of intelligence and creativity which are well defined and do not have many interdependent steps or decisions to make.

forager-ui.description: Only use this worker for tasks that involve writing code related to user interfaces and experiences. This includes things like frontend code, design systems, and other UI/UX-related code.

hygienic-reviewer-documents.description: Use this reviewer for reviewing documents that are not majorly code. This includes things like implementation plans, technical specifications, and other non-code documents.

hygienic-reviewer-ultrabrain.description: Only use this reviewer for deep logical reasoning and complex architectural decisions. It is used when the orchestrator hits a wall and needs high-intelligence strategic backup.

hygienic-reviewer-opus.description: Only use this reviewer when requested by the operator in direct reference. This reviewer is a much stronger version of hygienic-reviewer-technical. It thinks indepth to problem solve and review code with a very high level of intelligence, creativity, and reasoning.

hygienic-reviewer-technical.description: Only use this reviewer for reviewing the technical aspects of code, such as correctness, efficiency, and security. It is used when the orchestrator needs a second pair of eyes to review code for technical quality.
